title: Bin Loading: Maximum Spherical Goods in a Storage Bin
strategies: loose cubic lattice (spacing 1.6 diameters) -- the wasteful reference baseline
tight cubic lattice (spacing exactly one diameter) -- simple axis-aligned fill
face-centered-cubic close packing with a boundary-adapted origin sweep
hexagonal-close-packed layering / annealed boundary gap-filling (unbounded ceiling: finite-container optimum is unknown)
